violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Front of house upright cooler not working. Cooler used for drinks and ice cream toppings.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Particle board hand sink counter and particle board shelving in storage areas have exposed wood surface and should be sealed.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Store box of food service containers off floor in dry storage room.
